mapper.select: SELECT encounter.id AS encounter_id, encounter.order_id AS registration_id, encounter.doctor_id, encounter.patient_id AS patient_user_id, patient.display_name AS patient_name, encounter.department_id, department.name AS department_name, session.session_date, session.period_code, encounter.encounter_status, encounter.started_at, encounter.ended_at FROM visit_encounter encounter JOIN registration_order registration ON registration.id = encounter.order_id JOIN clinic_session session ON session.id = registration.session_id JOIN users patient ON patient.id = encounter.patient_id JOIN departments department ON department.id = encounter.department_id WHERE encounter.deleted_at IS NULL AND registration.deleted_at IS NULL AND session.deleted_at IS NULL AND patient.deleted_at IS NULL AND department.deleted_at IS NULL AND encounter.id = #{encounterId}
